     the Fermi energy is    -0.6735 ev

!    total energy              =  -14765.58883546 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <       0.00000002 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.19888072 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -14765.38995474 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -319555.13280317 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  161238.78660643 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -6092.47731357 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  149646.27610119 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -2.84254563 Ry

     absolute magnetization    =   107.86 Bohr mag/cell
